# Keith Chernek Photography

## Who

Keith Chernek is a commercial fashion and lifestyle photographer based in Irving, Texas (Dallas–Fort Worth). He works with models, brands, and agencies on model development sessions, brand campaigns, lookbooks, and editorial work.

Past clients and collaborators include Walmart, FloSports, Andi Bagus, and AvalTheBrand. Editorial work has been published in more than a dozen independent fashion magazines.

## Services

### Model Development — Digitals (Starting at $300)
- 1-hour session
- Agency-standard digitals: front, side, profile, smile, full body
- Multiple wardrobe changes (jeans, swim, neutrals — natural makeup)
- 1 personality video and 1 walking video included
- 15 lightly retouched images
- Custom comp card layout included
- Online gallery delivery
- For first agency submissions and comp card refreshes

### Model Development — Portfolio Shoot (Starting at $600)
- 2-hour session
- Professional hair and makeup included
- 3–4 styled looks with planned wardrobe
- Location-based: studio, outdoor DFW, or chosen environment
- Pre-shoot planning with shared mood references
- 15 fully retouched images
- Online proof gallery
- Also called a test shoot or agency test — for building creative range in a model's book

### Commercial & Brand Photography
- Lookbook and campaign photography
- Product photography
- Social media content packages
- Event and editorial coverage
- Creative direction available on request
- Project-based scoping — contact for custom quotes

## Location

Based in Irving, TX 75039 (Las Colinas area). Available throughout Dallas–Fort Worth and for travel. Shoots take place in studio, outdoor DFW locations, or on location depending on the project.

## Booking

Inquiries start via the contact form or directly at keith@kchernek.com. A 50% deposit secures a date. Final payment is due day of shoot. Proof gallery delivered within 7 days; retouched images within 2–3 weeks.
